title: Nursery Rhyme. CV. Proverbs.
content:
For every evil under the sun,
        There is a remedy, or there is none.
        If there be one, try and find it;
        If there be none, never mind it.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CV. Proverbs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
